name: yoroll-test-plugin
description: Keep the Yoroll DEV workspace visible, choose a creation in public MCP cards, and sign in only when a protected operation starts.

interface.shortDescription: Create workflows and media with Yoroll MCP
interface.longDescription: A test-environment preview that keeps Yoroll open as a visible DEV workspace, uses public MCP App cards to choose and configure interactive games, images, and videos, and requests OAuth only when a protected business tool is called. Every business change uses Yoroll MCP; Browser remains a visual workbench rather than an automation fallback.
defaultPrompt: Create an interactive game with Yoroll
Show my Yoroll projects and continue one
Generate a standalone image or video with Yoroll
